$comment: Two-block STUDIO ingestion manifest (CEO/architect lock 2026-06-23, lock-step refresh 2026-06-27): schema_a_core mirrors scpn_phase_orchestrator.studio.federation_manifest CapabilityManifest fields; architecture_map is this repo's verified superset extension the Hub ignores for federation. Public status vocabulary: wired | library-only | stub | feasibility-only; SOTA/ClaimStatus grades live only in the private audit.

schema_a_core.note: SPO's schema-A fields are sourced from studio/federation_manifest.py, locked by tests against the optional scpn-studio-platform CapabilityManifest, and admitted by the current STUDIO Platform schema-A federation gate. The live /api/studio-feed endpoint uses the sibling studio.control-feed.v1 wire envelope.

architecture_map.role: Domain-agnostic coherence-control core (topology + solver) of the SCPN ecosystem; review-only by default.

lanes.name: binding+oscillators+drivers+imprint
lanes.note: Hilbert, wavelet-ridge, and zero-crossing extractors are implemented; MQTT and OPC-UA runtime waveform tags dispatch through the declared extractor type.

lanes.name: coupling
lanes.note: coupling_est and public plasticity are intentionally Python-only; plasticity.rs remains a native reference/parity candidate because its decay+dt semantics differ from the validated integration-gated Python API. Reserved inference methods fail closed with UnsupportedInferenceMethodError.

lanes.name: ssgf
lanes.note: self-stabilising gauge-field closure; opt-in, not in default loop.

lanes.name: autotune
lanes.note: offline binding-spec inference; candidate-safety certificate does not block.

lanes.name: upde
lanes.note: 14-15 engine variants; JAX engines pragma:no cover.

lanes.name: monitor
lanes.note: twin_conformal_gate (CPTC) is wired as an opt-in live policy-admission gate when callers supply an observed-twin confidence stream; modal_participation/phase_koopman/koopman_edmd/oscillation_modes remain reviewed APIs used by the dVOC/Koopman review path.

lanes.name: supervisor
inputs: optional verified neural CBF admission gate
lanes.note: Python supervisor remains the default live-control path; optional PolicyCBFAdmissionGate admits matched actions through verified neural CBF filters and emits per-decision SMT-LIB audit artefact hashes; optional spo-supervisor PyO3 bindings are validated by supervisor.rust_backend and reported by spo doctor; several lanes offline/review-only; policy rules export to PRISM, TLA+, and SMT-LIB feasibility models.

lanes.name: nn
lanes.note: parallel differentiable track; CLI-verification only; former 1.0-blocking validation gaps are resolved, with remaining non-blocking precision/finite-size xfails tracked in the public register.

lanes.name: runtime+actuation+assurance+audit
lanes.note: protobuf stream integrity is surfaced at simulate run end; signing is env-gated; actuation_permitted is documentary; hard-deadline loops default to miss_policy=abort; Koopman MPC is offline/review-only rather than a live simulate mode.

lanes.name: adapters+apps
lanes.note: 23 bridges, opt-in, not wired into the core loop; only QuantumControlBridge imports a sibling (lazy). FMI co-simulation and hybrid co-compiler review/export surfaces are shipped and reported by spo doctor adapter diagnostics.

lanes.name: studio+reporting+visualization
lanes.note: 13 review panels all execution_disabled; /api/studio-feed emits a read-only studio.control-feed.v1 envelope with spo.studio-runtime-snapshot.v1 runtime payload.

lanes.name: plugins+scaffold+domainpacks
lanes.note: registry split done; entry-point discovery wired but unpopulated in base; 36 domainpacks.

lanes.name: experimental/accelerators
lanes.note: load-bearing polyglot accelerator layer (misnomer 'experimental'); 170 files; accessed indirectly via dispatchers.

backends.build_vs_runtime: built (libspo_kernel.so) but not importable in every env
optional [nn] extra; parallel, not in default loop
standalone crate, not linked to spo-engine

interfaces.entry: runtime/server.py; 9 routes including /api/studio-feed; optional X-API-Key + rate limit
studio/ ExportManifest (dataclass) + read-only studio.control-feed.v1 live feed

boundaries: Rust kernel builds but is not active in every environment; dispatch falls back to Python.
nn/ differentiable track is parallel and CLI-verification only; former 1.0-blocking validation gaps are resolved, with remaining non-blocking xfails tracked.
ssgf/ and autotune/ are opt-in, not in the default loop.
experimental/ is the load-bearing accelerator layer, not research.
Hilbert, wavelet-ridge, and zero-crossing extractors are implemented; MQTT and OPC-UA runtime waveform tags dispatch through the declared extractor type.
Audit chain is real but integrity-verify/replay are opt-in CLI; signing is env-gated.
twin_conformal_gate (CPTC) is wired into live policy admission only when callers provide the observed-twin confidence source; default CLI runs do not synthesize that feed.
Formal export covers PRISM, TLA+, and generated policy SMT-LIB feasibility models; external checker execution remains non-actuating and package/readiness-gated.

studio/ emits a read-only studio.control-feed.v1 live feed at /api/studio-feed; schema-A CapabilityManifest fields are verified against studio/federation_manifest.py and admitted by the current STUDIO Platform federation gate.
